$comment: FC7 C1c (D-FC7-SYSV-STRUCT-RETURN-IN-REGS): x86_64 SysV struct RETURN by value across all return classes — mkTri()=12B in TWO registers (rax:rdx; z@8 in rdx), mkBig()=24B via SRET hidden pointer (>16B MEMORY; c@16 survives the copy-through), mkMix()={double;long} MIXED (d@0 in xmm0, n@8 in rax). (20+1+1)+(6+7+0)+((int)5.0+2)=42 via non-inlined mk()/mkl()/mkd(). SysV runtime = x86_64-ELF only (Win64/AAPCS64 fail loud, C2/C3; Mach-O-x86_64 SysV has no CI leg).
